DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION AND STEVE WESTLY, the STATE CONTROLLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCE: Peter A. Brandt, Esq. of The Humane Society Of The United States 202/955-3669 for pltfs & opposing parties; Paul D. Gifford, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2253 for defendants & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustained the demurrer. Deft to submit proposed order to include in brackets with or without leave to amend, for Court to determine. (302/REQ/JT) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
